history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We have three sizes of Our World Famous Fries. Would you like to order any?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant, so no dairy. What do you recommend for a hearty meal?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We have Chicken McNuggets that don't contain dairy and are safe for lactose intolerance. For a hearty meal, I'd recommend the largest size — would you like to order that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the largest Chicken McNuggets. Do you have any drinks or sides I could add?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Confirming your order: 1 large Chicken McNuggets®. Do you want to add a drink, fries, or dessert?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the fries. That should make a hearty meal.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it! We have small, medium, and large sizes of Our World Famous Fries. Which size would you like? Let me confirm your order.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Large. That should cover the meal.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Confirming your order: 1 large Chicken McNuggets® and 1 large Our World Famous Fries. Is that correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. No changes needed.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 large Chicken McNuggets® and 1 large Our World Famous Fries. Thanks for your order! Have a great day.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thanks! I'm all set. Enjoy your meal.
